evidence.quote: ### 3. Resolving Earthly Motion (Tendency and Push vs. Hindrance)

parsed_verdict.reasoning: On reconsideration: the rule set consists of 3 top-level rules (Domains and Natural Tendencies; Hindrance of the Surroundings; Resolving Earthly Motion). With rule_count = 3, N9 passes easily, and N12 is exempt (< 5 rules). The three rules cover distinct phenomena (natural tendencies, medium/shape resistance, resolution of pushed motion) without paraphrastic duplication, so N10 passes. Each rule traces to specific observations (Rule 1: obs 1, 3, 4, 5, 8, 10, 12; Rule 2: obs 6, 9, 11, 12; Rule 3: obs 1, 2, 7, 9), with no fabricated mechanisms beyond permitted Aristotelian elaboration, so N11 passes. Verdict should be PASS.
